title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Petroleum Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Petroleum Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Petroleum Global Group in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Petroleum Global Group:
Bharat Petroleum Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum Global Group!
